home.name: Mahmoud El-Sayed Shalaby
home.description: Full Stack Developer with hands-on experience in Laravel, currently building and maintaining multi-tenant web applications, ERP modules, and e-learning systems. Comfortable working with RESTful APIs, payment integrations, and modern front-end tools. Quick learner who thrives in collaborative environments.

resume.headline: Why Hire Me ?
resume.summary: Extensive experience in various fields, I have strong problem-solving skills, scalable solutions, high performance, collaborative and goal-oriented.

experience.description: Experienced Full Stack Laravel Developer with a strong background in multi-tenant systems, ERP modules, and e-learning platforms. Skilled in building scalable, secure, and high-performance applications. Passionate about problem-solving, innovation, and delivering efficient digital solutions.

items.title: Full Stack Laravel Developer
items.description: Building multi-tenant SaaS systems, ERP modules, and e-learning platforms using Laravel 12 with Paymob and VdoCipher integrations.

education.description: Over the years I have learned many skills and techniques in college and in intensive programs and trainings focused on the field of Full Stack Development gaining hands-on experience in this technologies and best coding practice.

skills.description: Strong problem-solving and critical thinking abilities, with effective communication and collaboration in team environments. Skilled in time management and adapting to new technologies. Demonstrated leadership and initiative in various projects.

about.description: I am passionate about technology and computing, with a constant desire to learn and grow. I enjoy taking on technical challenges and solving complex problems. I also believe in maintaining a balance between work and personal life, and I make sure to spend time exercising and connecting with my friends and family.

projects.title: ZMK E-Learning Platform
projects.description: Full e-learning platform built with Laravel 12. Features student portal, Paymob payments, OTP auth, VdoCipher video streaming, quizzes, certificates, and progress tracking.

projects.title: Multi-Tenant Clinic Management System
projects.description: Multi-tenant SaaS for clinics handling registration, appointments, patient records, prescriptions, invoices, and expense tracking with isolated data per tenant.

projects.title: SaaS Subscription System
projects.description: Subscription platform with Paymob payments, self-service renewal, modular activation, extra-user purchases, and automated lifecycle management for ERP clients.

projects.title: Tadawi - Healthcare Platform
projects.description: Multi-stakeholder platform connecting patients, doctors, and pharmacies with AI-powered drug alternatives, OTP auth, digital prescriptions, and real-time stock visibility.

projects.title: Paper Shelf - Online Bookstore
projects.description: Full-featured online bookstore with multi-role access (Admin, Author, User), JWT/OTP authentication, AI book summaries via OpenAI, and Stripe payment integration.

projects.title: Pack&Go E-commerce
projects.description: Responsive e-commerce site for travel bags with Firebase auth (Google sign-in), PayPal checkout, Firestore order tracking, and admin dashboard for product management.

projects.title: Hair Pilot Salon With AI
projects.description: Angular web app for personalized haircut suggestions using AI face shape detection, with real-time recommendations, salon booking via Firestore, and responsive UI.

projects.title: MEDNIOVA - Medical Clinic
projects.description: Modern responsive landing page for a medical clinic with smooth scrolling, clean service layout with pricing, and cross-device responsiveness.

projects.title: Coffee Corner Landing Page
projects.description: Modern responsive landing page for a coffee shop with smooth scrolling, clean menu layout with product images and pricing, and full device responsiveness.

contact.heading: Let's Work Together
contact.description: If you need a professional website design or want to build a website from scratch, I'm here to help! I can also create creative landing pages that boost your conversion rate. Additionally, I have experience in website management and providing technical support to ensure smooth and efficient operation.
